query:
SELECT 
  a.direcao,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.descricao) as descricoes_unicas
FROM procedimentos p
JOIN arquivos a ON p.arquivoId = a.id
WHERE a.estabelecimentoId = 1
GROUP BY a.direcao;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT 
  a.direcao,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.descricao) as descricoes_unicas
FROM procedimentos p
JOIN arquivos a ON p.arquivoId = a.id
WHERE a.estabelecimentoId = 1
GROUP BY a.direcao;
